overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V depicting a first-person perspective walking steadily along a coastal highway bridge toward a mountain tunnel. The scene features moderate traffic passing by on the right, industrial storage tanks and mountains in the background, ocean views on the left, and clear sunny weather throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway bridge with industrial backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge shoulder toward the distant tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck traveling in the right lane, moving faster than camera

entered.detail: weathered concrete highway surface with visible lane markings and cracks
steel safety barrier separating the walkway from the ocean drop
dark arched tunnel mouth cutting through the mountain ahead
large white cylindrical industrial tanks at the base of the mountain
arid rocky mountains rising behind the industrial facilities
calm blue sea visible beyond the rocky coastline
sandy cliffs and rocks along the water's edge
tall metal street light fixture on the left side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a sunny coastal highway bridge with the camera walking forward along the shoulder. The tunnel entrance is visible in the far distance, flanked by industrial storage tanks and mountains on the right and ocean coastline on the left. A black pickup truck passes by on the right as the journey begins.

events.description: passing the first street light pole on the left side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge deck as the tunnel grows larger in the frame

notable_agents.action: dark sedan overtaking quickly in the right lane

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward along the bridge, passing the street light pole which falls behind on the left. The tunnel entrance becomes more prominent in the center of the frame while the industrial tanks on the right appear closer and more detailed. Traffic continues to flow past on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching tunnel entrance on coastal bridge

events.description: approaching the tunnel entrance, with the shadow of the tunnel mouth becoming visible on the road surface

agents.ego_description: approaching the tunnel entrance with vehicles continuing to pass by on the right

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera approaches the tunnel entrance which now dominates the center of the frame as a large dark archway. The industrial storage tanks on the right are now clearly visible in the near distance, and the shadow of the tunnel mouth begins to cast across the bridge deck ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a sunny coastal highway bridge that gradually closes in on a dark mountain tunnel. It begins on the bridge shoulder with a black pickup truck passing on the right, while the distant tunnel entrance is framed by industrial storage tanks and a wide ocean coastline. As the camera advances, a street light pole recedes into the distance on the left and the industrial tanks on the right grow larger and more detailed. The scene then shifts as the tunnel entrance expands to dominate the center of the frame, transforming from a distant point into a large dark archway. Finally, the camera approaches the mouth of the tunnel as its deep shadow begins to stretch across the bridge deck ahead.
